steps.title: Attach the relative clause
steps.content: The phrase after the blank explains what kind of company CAKE Literary is. It needs the relative pronoun that to link specializes to the noun company.

steps.title: Avoid separating essential detail
steps.content: A and C leave specializes without the needed connector. D adds a comma before an essential that-clause, incorrectly separating information needed to identify the company. Company that creates the correct integrated relative clause. The answer is B.
